2604.11544.title: Time is Not a Label: Continuous Phase Rotation for Temporal Knowledge Graphs and Agentic Memory
2604.11544.paper_summary: Structured memory representations such as knowledge graphs are central to autonomous agents and other long-lived systems. However, most existing approaches model time as discrete metadata, either sorting by recency (burying old-yet-permanent knowledge), simply overwriting outdated facts, or requiring an expensive LLM call at every ingestion step, leaving them unable to distinguish persistent facts from evolving ones. To address this, we introduce RoMem, a drop-in temporal knowledge graph module for structured memory systems, applicable to agentic memory and beyond. A pretrained Semantic Speed Gate maps each relation's text embedding to a volatility score, learning from data that evolving relations (e.g., "president of") should rotate fast while persistent ones (e.g., "born in") should remain stable. Combined with continuous phase rotation, this enables geometric shadowing: obsolete facts are rotated out of phase in complex vector space, so temporally correct facts naturally outrank contradictions without deletion. On temporal knowledge graph completion, RoMem achieves state-of-the-art results on ICEWS05-15 (72.6 MRR). Applied to agentic memory, it delivers 2-3x MRR and answer accuracy on temporal reasoning (MultiTQ), dominates hybrid benchmark (LoCoMo), preserves static memory with zero degradation (DMR-MSC), and generalises zero-shot to unseen financial domains (FinTMMBench).
2604.11544.paper_summary_zh: 結構化的記憶表示，例如知識圖譜，對於自主代理和其他長期運行的系統至關重要。<lb/>然而，大多數現有的方法將時間建模為離散的元數據，要麼按最近性排序（埋葬舊的但永久的知識），要麼簡單地覆蓋過時的事實，或者在每次攝取步驟中都需要昂貴的LLM調用，導致它們無法區分持久事實和不斷演變的事實。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們引入了RoMem，一個可插拔的時間知識圖譜模塊，適用於結構化記憶系統，並可應用於代理記憶及其他領域。<lb/>一個預訓練的語義速度閘將每個關係的文本嵌入映射到一個波動性分數，從數據中學習到不斷演變的關係（例如，“總統”）應該快速旋轉，而持久的關係（例如，“出生於”）應該保持穩定。<lb/>結合持續的相位旋轉，這實現了幾何陰影：過時的事實在複雜的向量空間中被旋轉出相位，因此時間上正確的事實自然優於矛盾，而無需刪除。<lb/>在時間知識圖譜的完成上，RoMem在ICEWS05-15上達到了最先進的結果（72.6 MRR）。<lb/>應用於代理記憶時，它在時間推理（MultiTQ）上提供了2-3倍的MRR和回答準確性，主導混合基準（LoCoMo），在靜態記憶中保持零退化（DMR-MSC），並在未見的金融領域（FinTMMBench）中實現零樣本泛化。
2604.11544.author: Weixian Waylon Li et.al.
2604.11544.authors: Weixian Waylon Li, Jiaxin Zhang, Xianan Jim Yang, Tiejun Ma, Yiwen Guo
